subcodes.first_line: O esteemed friend! Your letter was received, and from those spiritual bonds which sprang from the soul and conscience [3.5s]... ...During this journey it has become manifest and evident to me that the Western world has made extraordinary progress... In the world of nature the greatest dominant note is the struggle for existence--the result of which is the survival of the fittest...Praise be to God that the Sun of Reality has shone forth with the utmost brilliancy from the eastern horizon.... Spiritual education consists in the inculcation of the ideals of divine morality
subcodes.first_line_orig: دوست محترم من نامه شما رسید از آن روابط روحانی که منبعث از جان و وجدان بود
subcodes.subjects: @lists; enumerations of Baha'i principles, @competition vs. cooperation; the struggle for existence, @two kinds of civilization; material and spiritual civilization, @oneness; unity of religion, @mission of the Manifestation of God in the world
